name: Specialist Bench
description: 6 specialist subagents + domain modes. For complex multi-domain work. Adversarial roles (architecture-critic, red-team) reach the Gemini family via the REST API (`scripts/lib/gemini-api.sh`) — the CLI is retired; see ADR-027 and ADR-031.

notes.gemini_requirement: Gemini-family work routes through the REST API, NOT a CLI: ADR-027 retired the Gemini CLI (IneligibleTierError — the CLI is dead) and moved these roles to `scripts/lib/gemini-api.sh`, keyed on `GEMINI_API_KEY` (env) or macOS Keychain `gemini-api-key`. Per ADR-031 the Gemini dependency is a soft key check in `advisory_smoke_tests` ([ -n $GEMINI_API_KEY ] || Keychain `gemini-api-key`), NOT a hard `command: gemini` requirement (that binary can no longer authenticate). It is not a hard `requirements[]` entry: ADR-030's advisory-requirement mechanism is command-only, and a hard `keychain_item` would abort a fresh install — the advisory smoke test (run by verify.sh at install step 5) carries the warning instead.
notes.domain_modes_path: domain-modes.json installs to ~/.claude/config/domain-modes.json (the /domain-mode skill reads it from there). Artifact 4's manifest said ~/.claude/domain-modes.json — corrected for consistency with the skill and the other config files.
notes.prompt_caching: config/prompt-caching.json is installed at Tier 2 (tier-3 extends tier-2); not re-listed here.
